zh.lifeSummary: William Tyllesworth是William Tylsworth和Emme Iwardby的兒子，於1501年出生在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 彼得 維斯亞普。他於1515年與Joanne Pottkins在英國英格蘭艾可素斯明斯特結婚。他們至少是5個女兒的父母。他去世於1557年在英國米德萊可倫敦享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 馬修 福利代 史崔特 煙雨 聖 彼得 亞普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William Tyllesworth是William Tylsworth和Emme Iwardby的儿子，于1501年出生在英国英格兰倫敦聖 彼得 維斯亞普。他于1515年与Joanne Pottkins在英国英格兰艾可素斯明斯特结婚。他们至少是5个女儿的父母。他去世于1557年在英国米德萊可倫敦享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦聖 馬修 福利代 史崔特 煙雨 聖 彼得 亞普。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: William Tyllesworth was born in 1501, in St Peter Westcheap, London, England, United Kingdom as the son of William Tylsworth and Emme Iwardby. He married Joanne Pottkins in 1515, in Southminster, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 daughters. He died in 1557, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in St Matthew Friday Street with St Peter Cheap, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: William Tyllesworth est né en 1501, à St Peter Westcheap, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de William Tylsworth et Emme Iwardby. Il a épousé Joanne Pottkins en 1515, à Southminster, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1557, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à St Matthew Friday Street with St Peter Cheap, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Tyllesworthは1501年にイギリスイギリスロンドンスト ペター ウエストチェアップでWilliam TylsworthとEmme Iwardbyの息子として生まれた。1515年にイギリスイギリスエセックスソウスミンスターでJoanne Pottkinsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の娘の親であった。彼は1557年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンスト マシュー フリデイ ストレエト ウィス スト ペター チェアップにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Tyllesworth(은)는 1501년 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 피터 웨스트체아프에서 William Tylsworth(와)과 Emme Iwardby의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1515년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 소우스민스터에서 Joanne Pottkins(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1557년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 매슈 프리데이 스트릿 위스 스트 피터 체아프에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: William Tyllesworth родился в 1501 г. в местности ст питир весчип, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали William Tylsworth и Emme Iwardby. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanne Pottkins в 1515 г. в местности соутминстир, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1557 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэттьв фридеи стрит вит ст питир чип, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
